title: Scanner depth, auth hardening, infra supply chain
summary: Closed 1 Critical (moderator email-change takeover), 1 High (profile email change leaves new email auto-verified), 7 Medium (audit-log regression, plaintext share/invite tokens, no device-trust clear on password reset, signup per-IP only, scan URL-length not enforced in bulk/crawl/discover, GH Actions pinned to mutable tags, postgres:16-alpine mutable tag), and 6 Low/Informational.
